text:
Claims file (derived) 

VALUES: $ 

COMMENT: CCW calculates this variable as the sum of all MDCD_PD_AMT from the OT header claims that are for 
managed care capitated payments. These are header claims where the claim type code (T-MSIS 
variable called CLM_TYPE_CD) is equal to '2' (Medicaid or expansion claim) 'B' (S-CHIP claim) or 'V' 
(Other Services claim). MMLEADS may count claims (in the MDCD_OT_MC_CAPTD_USE variable) for 
which there is no corresponding payment information. 
 ^ Back to TOC
